summary: All theme selection features verified working. PATCH /api/profile/theme endpoint correctly persists themes to MongoDB. Theme carousel scroll position maintained on selection (no reset bug). Live preview updates immediately when theme changes. Public profile at /profile/[handle] displays saved theme with correct styling. All 8 themes available and functional.

minor.issue: Console error 'Failed to fetch data: TypeError: Failed to fetch' appears briefly during dashboard navigation - non-blocking

passed_tests: PATCH /api/profile/theme - successfully updates theme and returns themeConfig
All 8 themes (zen-minimal, sacred-earth, ocean-temple, forest-calm, sunset-glow, lavender-dreams, midnight-bloom, rose-quartz) can be set via API
Theme persists to MongoDB database - verified via GET /api/profile/[handle]
Public profile page displays correct theme styling (background gradient, text colors)
Theme carousel scroll position maintained after theme selection - NO scroll reset bug
Live preview updates immediately when theme is clicked
Rapid theme selection (multiple clicks) maintains scroll position
Profile editor loads with all theme options visible
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme selection system fully functional. Test user 'testuser' exists with working credentials. All 8 themes can be tested. PATCH /api/profile/theme endpoint requires authenticated session (cookie-based). Theme carousel uses THEMES_LIST memo and handleThemeChange callback to prevent scroll reset.
